_description: Real patient MK-0003 (Kenji Tanaka). 35M, asymptomatic Hepatitis B found on routine screening. No risk factors, normal BMI, low alcohol. Clear hepatitic pattern. Expected: no red flag, hepatitic, no dilemma (clear viral hepatitis), monitoring required for Hep B surveillance.
_expected_path: GP_REFERRAL → EXTRACT → RED_FLAG(no) → TRIAGE → GP_LETTER → LFT_PATTERN(hepatitic) → HEPATITIC_INVESTIGATIONS → DILEMMA(no) → CONSULTATION → EDUCATION → MONITORING(yes) → SURVEILLANCE

symptoms: Management of newly diagnosed, asymptomatic Hepatitis B identified during routine insurance screening
Patient is asymptomatic. No history of jaundice, RUQ pain, or fatigue. Denies IV drug use.
